itemReviewed.name: Sri Krish International School - Senneer Kuppam

address.streetAddress: OFFICE, Kundrathur Main Rd, Kovur, Rajiv Gandhi Nagar, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600128, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I attended this school nearly a decade ago and have only great things to say about my experience. The teachers are amazing, the curriculum is second to none and each child is treated with care.
My daughter has attended for three years now. She absolutely loves the school and the staff. Her teachers are a great encouragement and and the academic program is great.The administration is open minded and think outside the box to make a successful educational experience for the students. They teach value lessons, communication and leadership skills

itemReviewed.name: Sri Krish International School - Senneer Kuppam

itemListElement.reviewBody: Sri Krish International school has an incredible effect on our kids. It has disciplined and inculcated good qualities in them..Students are having a great curriculum with proper caring environment.Methods of teaching are very interactive and effective too.  Most impressing fact is that the classes are well organized and there are imaginative ideas used to guide the students to the right path.

itemReviewed.name: Sri Krish International School - Senneer Kuppam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Sri Krish International School is a great place for our kids development and future. Teachers are very friendly to move on with the kids as well as with parents which helps in creating a very strong bond between teachers and kids. Their teaching system is always one step higher than the other educational systems. Teachers know to come below the kids level and teach students in a way that kids could understand the subject in deep.Teachers are making students to think beyond the concepts.

The best school for studies, discipline, sports etc. Teachers are very polite, caring and encouraging. They bring out
the best in each and every kid. Apart from studies students showcase their talents in extracurricular activities too. The school having best infrastructure like smart board in every classes, Robotics lab,  various clubs etc. We are very happy to about my son's school.

itemReviewed.name: Sri Krish International School - Senneer Kuppam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Sri Krish International school is a top-tier school that offers exceptional educational opportunities for students. The school boasts a vibrant and dynamic learning environment that encourages students to reach their full potential. The faculty are highly qualified and passionate about their subjects, and they are dedicated to providing students with the best possible education.

The school’s facilities are top-notch, with modern classrooms, well-equipped science, computer and robotics labs, and spacious playgrounds for sports and recreational activities. The faculty and staff work closely with parents to ensure that each student receives personalized attention and support to achieve their academic and personal goals.

Overall, I would highly recommend Sri Krish International School to anyone looking for a world-class education.
